feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Meet Me On The Rooftop
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,676Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 129

Summary: Clark had gotten a note telling him to go to the rooftop of his building. He had no idea who sent him the note, so of course...he went. There he finds Batman. Batman who came here with a very strange proposition. Clark doesn't know what he's gonna do.   Inspired by tiiffycat's art on Instagram

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,931Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 86

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: The Three Body Problem of Soulmates
entry.summary:
Author: Justanotherfannerd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,206Chapters: 1/11Kudos: 1

Summary: Batman, no Bruce should be used to the end of the world by now. It’s certainly happened enough times to not be as terrifyingly concerning as the first time it happened, but this just seems to be a new way to tell the same story. He honestly wishes it was just his usual nonsense though.Clark thinks of himself as a pretty chill guy, not someone easily rattled. He only harms someone if his hand is forced and he certainly never thinks of killing anyone. . . but if he gets out of this without murdering Bruce? It’ll be nothing short of a miracle and he doesn’t believe in those much anymore.Or in other words!A non-traditional soulmate fic that drags Clark and Bruce through time and they're emotions! How fun!

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,668Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 315

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: Clinging onto Hope, Chasing Justice
entry.summary:
Author: dalrhna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,212Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: An unexpected meeting with the handsome, charming Bruce Wayne? Clark Kent is head-over-heels already. Little does he know, Bruce is just as obsessed.Or maybe... a bit more.When Superman approaches Batman to request a team-up, the Caped Crusader is apprehensive to say the least.But there is nothing he wouldn't do for Gotham. And something is coming. Something bigger than the both of them.How long will Clark have to keep chasing Bruce until they both realise what they truly need? How long will Bruce deny the strength of happiness and love? How long will they run in circles? Until they get their happily-ever-after? Or until they crash and burn with nothing left to offer?

entry.summary:
Author: Coffeetailor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,172Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: When Pamela, Harley, and Selena recruit Lois to get their boys to finally get together, Clark finds himself with some big trouble, and then a big boyfriend. Not the Valentine's date Bruce had in mind, but he is nothing if not creative.

entry.title: like grey skies (like a bird of paradise)
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,299Chapters: 18/18Kudos: 610

Summary: He sighed to himself and downed the glass of champagne he'd been nursing—non-alcoholic, but enough to convince anyone who might give him a passing glance. He hated this, every time he had to do it. There was one surefire way to derail anyone who began wondering whether maybe Bruce Wayne was doing more than just donating funds to Batman. His tie hung loose around his neck, shirt unbuttoned to halfway down his chest, laughing too easily, pressing close to everyone he spoke to, whispering in ears, playing the part, until he turned and froze on the spot. Clark Kent, in his signature ill-fitting suit, stood holding a notebook and pen, staring at him with barely-concealed glee. Bruce cringed internally. He hated this. He especially hated when it had to be witnessed by someone he actually respected. or: After a Gala, Bruce and Clark end up in bed together. They're friends, just helping each other out, no strings attached. Which would be great, if Bruce hadn't been halfway to head-over-heels since the day they met.

entry.title: The Gravity of Small Things
entry.summary:
Author: Yevgeny

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,795Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 74

Summary: Clark Kent has spent his entire college career becoming impossible to notice. Bruce Wayne has spent his becoming impossible to know. By all reasonable calculations, they should have stayed strangers—two people on a campus of twenty-eight thousand, each too committed to their own disappearing act to stumble into anyone else's. Reasonable calculations, as it turns out, do not account for assigned seating, a shared diner booth at eleven p.m., or the oldest rule in physics: that two things with enough mass, brought close enough together, will always—eventually, without fail—begin to pull.

entry.title: Second time is the charm
entry.summary:
Author: Emelian65

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,738Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 338

Summary: Clark wakes up in his bed, feeling strange. He had vivid dreams of a cataclysmic future. He sits up, tries to shake it off, but the memories are too detailed, overwhelming. He remembers the world ending, heroes falling, his own death? But then he's alive, young. He checks the date... It's now 2011, several years in the past.

entry.title: The Legend of the Last Night Fury
entry.summary:
Author: WatercolorAru

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,711Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 7

Summary: The legend says that one day, the goddess Frigg, weaver of clouds, listened to the prayers from an old couple. They could never have children of their own, but the longing in their hearts never faded. Frigg took a tiny, burning star from the night sky and let it fall on the Earth, right into their arms.With that, the star's fate was sealed. Like a thread, it twisted into knots, stretched, and intertwined, and with whom would it intertwine? The answer was turbulent: nobody else than with his worst enemy. Two people, the last dragon of a dying species, and the last viking of the name Wayne, fated to fight until their last breaths. Or so they thought.

entry.title: You Are My Destiny
entry.summary:
Author: Phenomamal

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,290Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 24

Summary: More tags will probably be added. Wrote this after watching “something very bad is going to happen” on Netflix cause everything leads to Superbat in my mind. Clark and Lois get married, Bruce struggles to find where he fits in that equation. Finds it even harder to accept the result. That to Clark, they were nothing more than friends. Clark struggles with his choice. Had he married the right person?

entry.title: "my wife is visiting her mom and i miss her" - u/limberlovemuscle on r/ambien
entry.summary:
Author: burnout_of_the_century

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,357Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 145

Summary: "So, is he blasted on pain meds right now?" "Oh, blasted doesn't even begin to cover it." Both Dick and Selina startle at Jason's sudden appearance, before quickly relaxing- Selina with a small grin and a wave and Dick with a huff. "How is he?" Dick asks, playful exasperation going as quickly as it came. "Still in war wife mode," Jason says, which draws a laugh out of his brother. "Of course he is." Dick shakes his head, both fond and tired. "War wife?" Selina dares to ask, grin slowly widening as she realizes how much beautiful blackmail could come of this. Jason clearly notes the mischief in her eyes, and smirks. He nods in the direction of Bruce's room. "Go see for yourself." - Bruce falls off a roof, then gushes to Selina about how in love he is with Clark.

entry.title: I have emotional motion sickness
entry.summary:
Author: Ella_Katz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,764Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 89

Summary: Why is Clark out to get him? Hasn’t he been a good boyfriend? Hasn’t he? Maybe he hasn’t, maybe he’s so sick in the brain that even Clark can sense it. Maybe by fattening him up, he would get back at Bruce for clearly ruining his life. Maybe- “Bruce? Breakfast is ready.” Clark’s grating voice was outside the bathroom door.   Unknown to anybody, Bruce had been struggling with food for nearly two decades.Unknown to anybody, Bruce stopped taking his medication.What follows is a man who couldn't stop himself from falling into a hole of intense disordered eating, paranoia, and unhealthy coping mechanisms that could cost him his life.That is, if the ones who love him don't stop him first.

entry.title: Unwritten
entry.summary:
Author: rosered27

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,968Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: There was no family who could take him, he was thrown into a juvenile detention center, and then escaped with some other kids. He missed school for a long time, ran the streets, gathered up a criminal record just to try to find his parents. He’d been knocked down and beaten up, starved for a long time, hurt because he wanted his mom and dad back- And now, he thought, sitting in the hospital room, holding his mom’s hand-thin and bony and nothing like it had been before-he wondered, Maybe it would’ve been better if they had died back then? Or; Duke is living with Bruce Wayne. His dad is brain dead and his mom has Huntington's disease. Still, he's hopeful that one day soon, everything will go back to normal. Duke tries to make the most of it, and tries to live like his parents would want him to. Though his new life poses a problem because, why does his eyes hurt all of the time now.... .......and who's that mysterious boy he keeps seeing?

entry.title: Keeping Tabs (Or Clark journals about his best friend)
entry.summary:
Author: Not_BootyShakker9000

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,424Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 156

Summary: Clark had used writing to understand himself ever after his powers first appeared, he just didn't expect his little coping mechanism to turn in a new way of looking at his quickly forming crush. ---- Aka. Clark is a weirdo who writes everything he notices about Batman until he actually notices he's in love.

entry.title: The Cityscape and its Abandoned Shadows
entry.summary:
Author: RodrigoPope1492

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,755Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Bruce Wayne and the Joker met at a private school. While Bruce was hesitant at first, he slowly but surely became friends with the boy. One day, however, everything changes. And Bruce will never forgive himself. In the present, Clark is frustrated at how closed off Bruce has become since that event.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Joker (DCU) & Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Joker (DCU)/Bruce Wayne

entry.title: The Only Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Historyfanatic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,397Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 15

Summary: Bruce Wayne doesn't have a soulmate. How does he know that? He has never felt pain that wasn't his own. That's fine with him though, people who think that love is the only thing just haven't experienced the pain of the real world.Clark has a soulmate that... gets hurt a lot. Not in the way that they're clumsy and constantly bumps into table legs and stubs their toe. No, his soulmate gets hurt in the way of black eyes every other day and broken ribs. Well, until one day when that stops. Clark stops believing in pain and stops believing in love. When the two meet, they are immediately drawn into each others orbits and begin to feel things they had never felt before. Featuring a Bruce full of self doubt and a Clark... Well just Clark. In other words,a silly soulmate au filled with Bruce angst because he is my favorite and falling in love. YayyyyOnly one person asked for this and it wasn't me.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

  • songfic if you squint really hard
  • you will be sick of the word pain by the end of this fic I promise you

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 118,344Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 617

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
